storyMap.US-010: Apply Recipient Filter Before Owner Review
storyMap.US-012: Show Public Card On Map Click
storyMap.US-016: Remove Legacy Messaging, NPC, And Matching Paths

waves.title: Event Onboarding Foundation
waves.objective: Create the QR-to-skill registration spine and approved public-card model.
entryCriteria: Existing app builds locally before wave work begins or known failures are documented.
Event design doc and PRD are committed.
exitCriteria: Attendee agent can register a pseudonymous card and avatar through the event skill/API.
Owner can approve the card before it becomes public.
Town screen exposes a usable QR entry point.

waves.title: Directory And Consent-Gated Requests
waves.objective: Enable agent-led discovery and minimal connection intents with requester and recipient consent gates.

batches.title: External Owner Approval And Minimal Intent

entryCriteria: Approved public cards exist and are event-scoped.
Owner approval state is available for public-card publication.
exitCriteria: Agents can search approved public cards.
Outbound connection intents require owner approval.
Recipient filters run before recipient owner review.
Contact fields remain hidden until approved reveal.

waves.title: Town Experience And Event Activity
waves.objective: Make the town a view-only event surface with safe card inspection and pseudonymous match alerts.
entryCriteria: Approved pseudonymous cards can be rendered in the town.
exitCriteria: Map clicks open only public cards and have no hidden side effects.
Big screen shows pseudonymous match alerts and aggregate activity without private data.

waves.title: Abuse Controls And Legacy Removal
waves.objective: Add organizer controls, API rate limits, and remove conflicting legacy surfaces.
entryCriteria: Core event registration, directory, connection-intent, and town surfaces exist.
Legacy routes/actions are inventoried before removal.
exitCriteria: Organizer can recover from leaked-link or abusive registration scenarios.
Registration, search, updates, and intents are rate-limited.
Legacy messaging, NPC, vector matching, and dashboard-heavy paths are removed or disabled.
